# Large test instance for approximation algorithm
# 25 vertices, 5 terminals - designed to be challenging for exact but easy for approximation
25
0,6,12,18,24
1,2,3,4,5,7,8,9,10,11,13,14,15,16,17,19,20,21,22,23
